# Prince Sarfo — Full-Stack Developer

> Personal portfolio of Prince Sarfo, a full-stack software engineer based in Ghana.

## About

Prince Sarfo is a full-stack developer specialising in building fast, accessible, and beautiful web and mobile experiences. He works across the full product stack — from pixel-perfect frontends to scalable backend systems.

## Skills

- **Frontend:** React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
- **Backend:** Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Redis
- **Tools:** Git, Docker, Figma, Vercel, AWS

## Work

Prince has shipped products used by thousands of users, contributed to open-source tooling, and worked across e-commerce, SaaS, and media verticals.

## Contact

- Email: snellmaxi6@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/Prince-Sarfo
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/prince-sarfo-5587b01a6/

This site includes an AI assistant powered by LangChain that can answer questions about Prince's work and experience. Visit /ai to interact with it.
